response:
CANDIDATE_PARTIAL: all x.(EuropeanSoccerClub(x) -> Attend(x, ucl))
CANDIDATE_OVERWEAK: exists x.(EuropeanSoccerClub(x) -> (Attend(x, ucl) & Attend(x, uel) & Attend(x, uecl)))
CANDIDATE_OVERSTRONG: all x.(EuropeanSoccerClub(x) & Attend(x, ucl) -> (Attend(x, uel) & Attend(x, uecl)))
CANDIDATE_GIBBERISH: all x.(Attend(x, ucl) -> EuropeanSoccerClub(x))
